Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: The course directly addresses energy consumption by discussing 'Environmental issues' of Bitcoin mining and more efficient alternatives like 'Staking and validation,' relating to Target 7.3.

Climate Action.reason: The course explores the 'intersection of blockchain with sustainability' and has a dedicated module 'Blockchain for Sustainable Development,' implying more than just awareness, but also potential solutions or integration of measures (Target 13.2).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Blockchain's decentralized nature enables transparent institutions (Target 16.6), and 'DAOs' offer new models for inclusive and participatory decision-making (Target 16.7).

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course disseminates knowledge on an enabling technology (Target 17.8) and explicitly links it to achieving goals via 'Blockchain for Sustainable Development' and 'Team Project Presentation' (Target 17.16).
